task:
Sync the two fixed files to pi-files and commit:

1. Sync:
```bash
rsync -av ~/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/subagent-runner.ts ~/pi-files/extensions/orchestrator/subagent-runner.ts
rsync -av ~/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/specialists.ts ~/pi-files/extensions/orchestrator/specialists.ts
```

2. Commit:
```bash
cd ~/pi-files && git add -A && git commit -m "style: fix indentation and deduplicate text in orchestrator

- subagent-runner.ts: fix 2 lines at column 0 (lastErrorMessage, unsubscribe)
- specialists.ts: remove duplicate Goal-achieved early stop from
  ACTIVITY_FEED_INSTRUCTION (kept only in STEPS_MANDATE)"
```
